claims.headline: Smoother, renewed skin
claims.notesSentence: Remodels the dermal extracellular matrix and supports tissue regeneration after skin injury.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: GHK-Cu tissue remodeling review on PubMed

claims.headline: Younger-looking skin
claims.notesSentence: Modulates expression of more than 4,000 human genes back toward a more youthful profile.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: GHK-Cu gene expression and aging study on PubMed

claims.headline: Boosts collagen
claims.notesSentence: Stimulates fibroblast collagen, elastin, and proteoglycan production in dermal studies.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: GHK-Cu collagen synthesis study on PubMed

claims.headline: Stronger, fuller hair
claims.notesSentence: Increases hair-follicle size and reduces follicle-cell apoptosis in scalp-tissue models.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: GHK-Cu tissue remodeling and hair follicle review on PubMed

claims.headline: Antioxidant shield
claims.notesSentence: Quenches reactive oxygen species and protects keratinocytes from UV-induced oxidative damage.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: GHK-Cu antioxidant and neuroprotection study on PubMed
